Sunday meeting sees Arsenal player close to exit – Contract termination a possibility
arts.sum: Flamengo have already confirmed their desire to sign Arsenal’s Jorginho at the end of this season. The Brazil-born Italy international’s contract expires in June and he travelled with his family to Rio de Janeiro during the last international break. Globo Esporte state the Arsenal player’s trip helped the move progress and they provide the latest on The post Sunday meeting sees Arsenal player close to exit – Contract termination a possibility appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta excited by ‘big summer’ after Andrea Berta’s arrival at Arsenal
arts.sum: Striker believed to be main transfer objective Arsenal hope to extend Saka and Saliba contracts Mikel Arteta is looking forward to “a big summer” working with Arsenal’s new sporting director, Andrea Berta, as the club attempt to strengthen their squad to sustain another Premier League title push next season. Arsenal go into Tuesday night’s meeting with Fulham trailing the leaders, Liverpool, by 12 points with nine games to play and look destined to finish as runners up for a third straight campaign. But after the arrival of Berta – the former Atlético Madrid sporting director who has replaced Edu – Arsenal are expected to step up their search for additions, with a striker believed to be the main objective. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Fulham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal face Fulham in the Premier League this evening aiming to close the gap on leaders Liverpool. The Gunners can move within nine points of Liverpool with a win at the Emirates, after entering the international break following a 1-0 win over Chelsea. arts.ttl: Man Utd face biggest test as Saka makes timely Arsenal return
arts.sum: How Leicester supporters would love a season of disappointment like the one Manchester City are 'enduring' - a FA Cup semi-final at Wembley to look forward to with Pep Guardiola's side still well placed to secure Champions League football next term. Alexander-Arnold suffered a high ankle sprain in the club's Champions League loss to Paris Saint-Germain before the international break that will see him miss the visit of Everton, and with his back-up Conor Bradley also likely to be absent with a hamstring issue, Slot must decide who starts on the right-hand side of the defence as the Reds look to take another step closer to the title.

arts.ttl: 'I played with Mikel Arteta and saw the qualities he's shown to transform Arsenal'
arts.sum: Former Arsenal defender Philippe Senderos played with the Gunners' current boss Mikel Arteta at Everton and believes the clues to his managerial quality were visible even then

arts.ttl: Arsenal guaranteed to be without four players vs Fulham as Bukayo Saka decision confirmed
arts.sum: And the preparation is to be better than Fulham and beat them tomorrow," the Arsenal boss said on Monday. Arsenal have nine games of the Premier League season remaining, as well as at least two Champions League matches against Real Madrid, and Mikel Arteta is keen to build some momentum ahead of the run-in.
Will Bukayo Saka feature from the jump after returning to full fitness over the international break?
